# init(named:fromURL:)

**Initializer**

Creates an action of the given name from an action file.

## Declaration

```swift
init?(named name: String, fromURL url: URL)
```

## Parameters

- **name**: The name of the action.
- **url**: The URL of the file containing the action.

## Return Value

A new action object.
